chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-3597 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Priority. 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of Misc. No.14961/2025 3. For hearing of main case. 11.08.2025. Mr. Maroof Hussain, Counsel for the petitioners. Mr. Feroze Gul, Advocate for the Complainant. Mr. Ali Safdar Deepar, AAG alongwith Raza Mian, DSP Legal-II-CPO, PI Iqbal, SIO/PI Amin Altaf and PI Rana Sarfaraz of PS Tipu Sultan. ------------------------------ Main grievance of the learned counsel for the petitioner is that the petitioner Mst. Rabia and her husband Asad in custody are being harassed and attacked by Respondent No.7 Advocate Faique Hussain and police officials are failing to provide protection to the petitioner and her husband Asad. Respondent No.7 Faique Hussain has appeared in Court today, who is an also an advocate, and undertakes that he will not cause any harassment or instigate any other lawyer to cause harassment to either the petitioner or her husband as and when they appear before the Court of Law. SHO, PS City is directed to ensure that as and when petitioner and her husband Asad attended the trial proceedings they are provided with protection so that any untoward incident is avoided. A copy of this order shall be sent to IGP, Sindh and SSP City for information and compliance. A copy of this order shall also be sent to President, High Court Bar Association, Vice President, Sindh Bar Council and President Karachi Bar Association who shall ensure that Advocates shall conduct themselves and act strictly in accordance with law throughout any judicial proceedings notwithstanding who is the accused may be and what offence committed and maintain decorum at all times against the petitioner and her husband.

A copy of this order shall be sent to IGP, Sindh and SSP City for information and compliance. A copy of this order shall also be sent to President, High Court Bar Association, Vice President, Sindh Bar Council and President Karachi Bar Association who shall ensure that Advocates shall conduct themselves and act strictly in accordance with law throughout any judicial proceedings notwithstanding who is the accused may be and what offence committed and maintain decorum at all times against the petitioner and her husband. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
